## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as User
    participant Shell as Shell
    participant Env as Environment
    participant PyLocal as python-lambda-local
    participant Handler as search_handler.lambda_handler
    participant File as download.json

    User->>Shell: execute bash script
    Shell->>Shell: echo "locations get"
    Shell->>Env: set PYTHONPATH (container_tracking_service)
    Shell->>Env: append common/fv/python to PYTHONPATH
    Shell->>PyLocal: start process with AWS env & timeout 120
    PyLocal->>Handler: load /container_tracking_service/api/search/search_handler.py and call lambda_handler
    Handler->>File: open and read download.json
    File-->>Handler: return payload
    Handler-->>PyLocal: return lambda response
    PyLocal-->>Shell: process exits with result
```
